meta.summary: pairtools 1.1.3 command-line toolkit for extracting, sorting, filtering, deduplicating, and summarizing Hi-C .pairs/.pairsam files.
meta.description: pairtools 1.1.3 command-line toolkit for extracting, sorting, filtering, deduplicating, and summarizing Hi-C .pairs/.pairsam files.

test: set -eu; test "$(pairtools --version)" = 'pairtools, version 1.1.3'; python -c 'import pairtools, bioframe, click, numpy, pandas, pysam, scipy, yaml; print(pairtools.__version__)' | grep -Fx '1.1.3' >/dev/null; pairtools --help | grep -F 'Flexible tools for Hi-C data processing' >/dev/null; pairtools parse --help | grep -F 'Find ligation pairs' >/dev/null; pairtools sort --help | grep -F 'Sort a .pairs/.pairsam file' >/dev/null

set -eu; tmp=/tmp/taf-pairtools-parse-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; cp /opt/pairtools/share/testdata/mock.sam "$tmp/mock.sam"; cp /opt/pairtools/share/testdata/mock.chrom.sizes "$tmp/mock.chrom.sizes"; samtools view -bS "$tmp/mock.sam" > "$tmp/mock.bam"; pairtools parse --walks-policy mask -c "$tmp/mock.chrom.sizes" --drop-sam -o "$tmp/parsed.pairs" "$tmp/mock.bam"; test -s "$tmp/parsed.pairs"; grep -F '#columns: readID chrom1 pos1 chrom2 pos2 strand1 strand2 pair_type' "$tmp/parsed.pairs" >/dev/null; grep -F 'read' "$tmp/parsed.pairs" >/dev/null; rm -rf "$tmp"

set -eu; tmp=/tmp/taf-pairtools-sort-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; pairtools sort /opt/pairtools/share/testdata/mock.4flip.pairs -o "$tmp/sorted.pairs.gz"; test -s "$tmp/sorted.pairs.gz"; bgzip -dc "$tmp/sorted.pairs.gz" > "$tmp/sorted.pairs"; grep -F '#sorted: chr1-chr2-pos1-pos2' "$tmp/sorted.pairs" >/dev/null; pairtools select "pair_type == 'UU'" "$tmp/sorted.pairs" -o "$tmp/selected.pairs.lz4"; test -s "$tmp/selected.pairs.lz4"; lz4c -dc "$tmp/selected.pairs.lz4" > "$tmp/selected.pairs"; grep -F 'UU' "$tmp/selected.pairs" >/dev/null; rm -rf "$tmp"

set -eu; tmp=/tmp/taf-pairtools-stats-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; pairtools stats --yaml /opt/pairtools/share/testdata/mock.4stats.pairs > "$tmp/stats.yaml"; grep -F 'total: 9' "$tmp/stats.yaml" >/dev/null; grep -F 'total_dups: 1' "$tmp/stats.yaml" >/dev/null; pairtools dedup --mark-dups --output "$tmp/dedup.pairsam" --output-dups "$tmp/dups.pairsam" /opt/pairtools/share/testdata/mock.4dedup.pairsam; test -s "$tmp/dedup.pairsam"; test -s "$tmp/dups.pairsam"; grep -F '#columns:' "$tmp/dedup.pairsam" >/dev/null; rm -rf "$tmp"

upstream.name: pairtools
upstream.citation: Open2C et al. Pairtools: from sequencing data to chromosome contacts. bioRxiv (2023).
